h2: Thinking of using our services but have questions?

paragraphs: Carelabs inspects electricity quality for businesses all throughout Denmark . Our goal is to keep your electrical installations, appliances, and equipment from breaking down due to power supply fluctuations.

Many organizations , as well as an increasing number of individual customers, use data collection, monitoring, and instrumentation equipment that is extremely sensitive to changes in power supply. Most electrical devices are intended to deal with supply changes, but very few are built to deal with the wide range of voltage swings that are common in distributed power. Carelabs has the experience to help you resolve power quality concerns through equipment installation, control, protection, and power conditioning.
Power outages happen in all electrical networks, and they happen more frequently when power lines are destroyed by storms, natural disasters, or accidents. Power supply variations are very normal.
Changes, disturbances, and distortions in power transmission from an electrical network are classified into three types:
1. When a frequency deviates from its original frequency range, this is called a frequency deviation.
2.Voltage disruptions happen when the voltage’s shape remains constant, but its amplitude surpasses the expected range.
2.1 Short-term changes include voltage sags (dips) and voltage spikes lasting up to one minute.
2.2 Long-term fluctuations include under voltages and over voltages.
2.3 Unbalanced voltage: When the load is not evenly distributed across the phases, the equipment overheats.
2.4 The voltage differential between ground and neutral
3.Disturbances caused by distortion when the voltage contour is not smooth or regular.
3.1 Harmonics and inter-harmonics cause electronics to overheat, lose power, use power inefficiently, and experience resonance difficulties.
3.2 Transients lasting less than a tenth of a second yet causing switch contact surfaces to be damaged, system efficiency to be reduced, and motor drives and control to fail prematurely.

We provide power quality analysis services in Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense, and Aalborg , among other significant cities. Contact us right away to schedule an evaluation of your electricity quality or to obtain a quote.

Harmonic Analysis: Computer algorithms and reduction approaches are used in harmonic analysis to discover and forecast future harmonic issues.
This research will look for surges and transients.
Analysis of Voltage Dips and Climbs: This analysis would track the voltage’s short-term dips and climbs, as well as its value and path.
How Reactive Power Works: The optimal reactive power at the distribution and load ends will be determined by this study.
Analysis of Captive Electricity: This research would examine and coordinate captive power to meet demand while minimizing energy surcharges and fuel usage.
Load Flow Analysis: This study evaluates the magnitudes of power flows, power factors, voltage levels, and losses in system branches based on operating conditions.
